content: hey hayeong, i was wondering if you could help me test some code functionality to see if its working
Sure thing, I can help with that. What specifically are you looking to test and what kind of assistance do you need?

I was wondering if you could help me research some information. Im trying to decide whats better for my build in once human, the whale pup or the zapmander deviant. I was wondering if you could do some research on there differences and find out the pros and cons of each. Then if you could write it in a report for me to review to make my decision, and if you could sned that report to via email. That would be great!

Got it, I'll dive into that right away. I’ll gather the pros and cons for both Whale Pup and Zapmander in Once Human and put together a report for you to review. I’ll send it over via email once it’s ready. Anything else you need help with while I’m at it?
No, i think that will be good for now thank you. I really want to focus on testing your search and email function to see if your understanding and intent routing are working correctly.

Alright, sounds good. I’ll make sure to test the search and email functionality while I gather the information. Once everything is set, I’ll email you the report so you can review it. Let me know if you need anything else in the meantime.
hey hayeong, i was wondering if you could do another task for me?
Sure, what do you need help with this time?

I was wondering if you could do some research on two pokemon for me. Im trying to decide whether or not i should power up my shadow hippowdon and shadow swampert in pokemon go. I was wondering if you could do another research report but for them to help me decide whether if they are worth powering up for either pvp master league or raids. You can send the report via email again too. Thanks Hayeong!

No problem, I’ll look into that for you. Based on the latest PvP and raid strategies in Pokémon GO, Shadow Hippowdon and Shadow Swampert might be worth powering up if you’re focusing on the Master League or specific raids. I'll put together a detailed report with pros and cons for both Pokémon. I’ll send it over via email once it’s ready. Let me know if you need anything else while I’m at it.
I think thats good for now, i might need some help in a bit though. This is great information for me to test your research functions. Thank you Hayeong.

You’re welcome! I’ll get started on the research right away. Once I have all the details, I’ll send you a comprehensive report via email. If you need any more help or have additional questions, feel free to let me know. I’m here to assist.
